next_steps: Image-guided core biopsy of the retroperitoneal or mediastinal soft-tissue mass
Whole-body 18F-FDG PET-CT to evaluate the extent of systemic involvement
Comprehensive endocrine evaluation for diabetes insipidus (urine osmolality and serum sodium)
Histopathological analysis including immunohistochemistry for CD68, CD1a, and IgG4/IgG ratio
Cardiac MRI review for late gadolinium enhancement patterns
Image-guided biopsy of the retroperitoneal or mediastinal soft-tissue mass
Immunohistochemical staining of biopsy tissue for CD68, CD1a, S100, and IgG4
Evaluation for BRAF V600E mutation if histiocytic disease is suspected
Formal endocrine workup for central diabetes insipidus (urine and serum osmolality, water-deprivation test)
Skeletal survey or bone scintigraphy to evaluate for osteosclerosis
Serum and urine protein electrophoresis with immunofixation to rule out plasma cell dyscrasia
Antineutrophil cytoplasmic antibody (ANCA) testing to exclude associated vasculitis
